page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure dictation, model endpoints and app behavior. Changes apply instantly — no save needed.

hotkeys.how_it_works_body: Press the hotkey once to start speaking, press again to stop and insert the text into the focused field. A second press within 300 ms is treated as an accidental double-tap and the recording is discarded.

general.show_dock_hint: Show the OpenSpeech icon in the macOS Dock for quick access. When off, the app runs as a menu-bar-only app (you can still open the main window from the tray).
general.close_to_tray_hint: When on, closing the main window hides it to the tray; otherwise a confirm dialog appears each time.
general.update_policy_hint: Choose how OpenSpeech handles new versions discovered in the background.
general.update_check_interval_hint: How often the app polls in the background. The first check still runs at launch.

asr_segment.realtime_hint: Server splits at pauses and streams partials in real time. Best for long meeting captions, live transcription and other unattended scenarios.
asr_segment.utterance_hint: Treat the whole recording as a single utterance and return the transcript only after you release the key. The model gets full context — more accurate and won't be split by pauses.
asr_segment.ai_refine_hint: On top of "whole utterance", run an extra LLM pass to remove fillers, dedupe, recognise self-corrections, and list sequenced steps. Same language — no translation.

model.byo_unavailable_body: Custom STT REST endpoints (endpoint URL / API Key / model name / test connection) aren't wired up yet. All dictation currently goes through OpenLoaf SaaS. This surface is under active development and will be enabled in the next release.
model.api_key_hint: Stored in the system keychain; saved automatically on blur.
model.key_saved_toast: API Key saved to system keychain

personalization.context_style_hint: Pass the foreground app name to the model to adapt tone
personalization.sensitivity_hint: How aggressively new vocabulary is auto-collected

ai.mode_saas_hint: Use the fast chat model on your signed-in OpenLoaf account; billed by credits.
ai.mode_custom_hint: OpenAI-compatible endpoints with your own API Key. Multiple providers allowed, but only one active at a time.
ai.provider_api_key_hint: Stored in the system keychain; saved automatically on blur.
ai.prompts_hint: Defaults follow the interface language. Edit to customize; the same custom prompt then applies to all languages.
ai.include_history: Send the last 5 dictations as context
ai.include_history_hint: Recent transcripts help the model carry over tone and terminology.

about.update_channel_hint: Beta gets new features sooner but may be unstable. Switching back to Stable only delivers updates whose version is higher than the current beta.
